action.description: Issue directive requiring @ai probe annotations in all consumer repos (ix, tars, ga)

anticipated_harms.description: Developers may feel surveilled by mandatory probe annotations on their code
anticipated_harms.mitigation: Frame probes as documentation, not surveillance. Set gradual coverage targets (30% initial). Provide clear syntax guide.

anticipated_harms.description: Annotation overhead may slow development velocity in short term
anticipated_harms.mitigation: Start with only exported/public symbols. Probes double as documentation, offsetting overhead.

undecidable_aspects: Whether probe coverage actually improves code quality long-term
Whether developers will internalize probes or treat them as bureaucratic overhead
logotron_check.metalanguage_risk: Probes describe code semantics, but who probes the probes? The ai-probes-policy governs probe usage, creating one level of metalanguage.
